title: rubus × falsimultifidus
intro: Rubus × falsimultifidus, a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, is a type of wild bramble plant that is native to certain regions of Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × falsimultifidus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support cardiovascular health, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and grinding them into a powder for use in tinctures and capsules.
